LoginPage.metaDescription: Sign in to ABRIEV with Google, Facebook, or email — premium automotive marketplace access.
LoginPage.editorialLede: Pick up curated listings, saved favorites, and booking updates in one refined workspace.
LoginPage.editorialBulletsIntro: This sign-in mirrors the concierge desk experience — quiet typography, restrained chrome, intent-first motion.
LoginPage.bulletVerify: Identity verified dealers and gated listing tools.
LoginPage.bulletSaved: Favorites sync across showroom search and concierge follow-ups.
LoginPage.bulletQuiet: Form controls stay hushed until you interact — no gimmicks.
LoginPage.panelSubtitle: Use a social provider or email. Password sign-in persists once your tenancy is wired in Phase 4.
LoginPage.forgotHint: We will wire self-serve resets with your tenancy. Reach the desk from Contact for now.
LoginPage.oauthUnconfiguredBanner: Connect Google Sign-In or Facebook Login in environment variables — set AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET and AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_ID / AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET.
LoginPage.oauthFailedBanner: We couldn’t finish signing in with that provider. Try again or choose another option.
LoginPage.oauthStateBanner: Your session expired. Please try again.
LoginPage.credentialPasswordShort: Use at least 8 characters for your password.
LoginPage.credentialBackendPending: Email and password authentication is scaffolded — use Google or Facebook today, or contact Concierge.

RegisterPage.metaDescription: Join ABRIEV with Google, Facebook, or email — curated vehicles and verified dealers.
RegisterPage.editorialLede: Save trims, concierge threads, and test-drive slots in one profile designed for discerning buyers.
RegisterPage.editorialBulletsIntro: Registration keeps the showroom quiet — essentials only until you intentionally share more.
RegisterPage.bulletConcierge: Concierge-backed listings with transparent dealer verification.
RegisterPage.bulletShortlist: Shortlists persist across desktop and mobile showroom sessions.
RegisterPage.bulletConsent: You control outbound email — muted by default.
RegisterPage.panelSubtitle: Use Google, Facebook, or email. Automated provisioning attaches once your tenancy is live.
RegisterPage.legalLead: By registering you agree to the
RegisterPage.oauthUnconfiguredBanner: Connect Google Sign-In or Facebook Login in environment variables — set AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET and AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_ID / AUTH_FACEBOOK_APP_SECRET.
RegisterPage.oauthFailedBanner: We couldn’t finish registration with that provider. Try again or choose email.
RegisterPage.oauthStateBanner: Your session expired. Please try again.
RegisterPage.credentialNameShort: Add your full name (at least 2 letters).
RegisterPage.credentialBackendPending: Saved profiles are scaffolded until your tenancy is wired — finish with Google, Facebook, or concierge onboarding.
